Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Packaging a Gleam app into a single executable 82 upvotes, 7 comments
  2. RCade: Building a Community Arcade Cabinet 33 upvotes, 2 comments
  3. The 185-Microsecond Type Hint 32 upvotes, 2 comments
  4. First in-utero stem cell therapy for fetal spina bifida repair is safe: study 243 upvotes, 46 comments
  5. "That Shape Had None" – A Horror of Substrate Independence (Short Fiction) 76 upvotes, 13 comments
  6. Inside the M4 Apple Neural Engine, Part 1: Reverse Engineering 263 upvotes, 67 comments
  7. Show HN: uBlock filter list to blur all Instagram Reels 92 upvotes, 22 comments
  8. Motorola announces a partnership with GrapheneOS 2045 upvotes, 728 comments
  9. Seed of Might Color Correction Process (2023) [pdf] 57 upvotes, 12 comments
  10. Show HN: I built a sub-500ms latency voice agent from scratch 121 upvotes, 32 comments
  11. How to Build Your Own Quantum Computer 7 upvotes, 0 comments
  12. Use the Mikado Method to do safe changes in a complex codebase 154 upvotes, 70 comments
  13. Show HN: Govbase – Follow a bill from source text to news bias to social posts 148 upvotes, 68 comments
  14. Build your own Command Line with ANSI escape codes (2016) 34 upvotes, 11 comments
  15. The workers behind Meta's smart glasses can see everything 400 upvotes, 219 comments
  16. British Columbia to end time changes, adopt year-round daylight time 377 upvotes, 215 comments
  17. Welcome (back) to Macintosh 223 upvotes, 126 comments
  18. LFortran compiles fpm 45 upvotes, 20 comments
  19. Show HN: Pianoterm – Run shell commands from your Piano. A Linux CLI tool 36 upvotes, 16 comments
  20. Programmable Cryptography 37 upvotes, 17 comments
  21. Launch HN: OctaPulse (YC W26) – Robotics and computer vision for fish farming 57 upvotes, 30 comments
  22. Show HN: Visual Lambda Calculus – a thesis project (2008) revived for the web 14 upvotes, 4 comments
  23. Closure of the Weatherradio Service in Canada 42 upvotes, 22 comments
  24. Parallel coding agents with tmux and Markdown specs 113 upvotes, 87 comments
  25. Against Query Based Compilers 6 upvotes, 1 comments
  26. iPhone 17e 182 upvotes, 199 comments
  27. Ask HN: Who is hiring? (March 2026) 157 upvotes, 212 comments
  28. New iPad Air, powered by M4 308 upvotes, 510 comments
  29. Ask HN: Who wants to be hired? (March 2026) 62 upvotes, 167 comments
